description_long: This warehouse is a rectangular, two-story building with a red gabled roof and a mix of white and wooden exterior wall panels. The main facade features a row of windows on the upper floor and a large entryway on the ground level, likely for vehicle or goods access. The structure is set on a green plot with a paved driveway leading up to the entrance, and a raised loading platform is visible adjacent to the main entry. The rear and side facades are simpler, with fewer windows and a more utilitarian appearance. The building is attached to a white annex or neighboring structure, suggesting it is part of a larger complex. The overall design is functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on practicality for storage and logistics.
description: A rectangular, two-story warehouse with a red gabled roof, white and wooden exterior panels, and a prominent entryway with a loading platform. The building is set on a green lot with a paved driveway and attached to a white annex.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long white facade, red gabled roof, and the attached white annex; the green lot and driveway are visible.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the white annex, the back of the warehouse, and the expansive green lot.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the main entryway, loading platform, upper windows, and the driveway leading up to the building.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the wooden paneling, the gabled roof, and the driveway extending toward the entrance.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade features a combination of white concrete and wooden paneling, with a row of rectangular windows on the upper floor and a large entryway below. A raised loading platform and minimal decorative elements emphasize the building's utilitarian function.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is a simple gabled structure covered with red tiles, with no visible skylights or rooftop equipment. Its clean lines and moderate pitch are designed for efficient water runoff.
